allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content ''C:\\Users\\ASUS\\.claude\\projects\\D--Projects-tryout-osn\\9a4e959b-ba69-4008-a04f-37795a007f26.jsonl'' | Select-Object -Last 5 | ForEach-Object { \($_| ConvertFrom-Json\).message.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_type -eq ''text''\) { $_text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_text.Length\)\) } } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$lines = Get-Content ''C:\\Users\\ASUS\\.claude\\projects\\D--Projects-tryout-osn\\9a4e959b-ba69-4008-a04f-37795a007f26.jsonl''; foreach\($line in \($lines | Select-Object -Last 8\)\) { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $role = $obj.message.role; if\($role -eq ''human''\) { foreach\($c in $obj.message.content\) { if\($c.type -eq ''text''\) { Write-Output \(''USER: '' + $c.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $c.text.Length\)\)\) } } } }")
